headline: OBX leads OSEBX by 326bp; Energy and Industrials drive advance
market_take: OBX outpaces OSEBX by 3.26 percentage points, confirming large-cap leadership within a broad_rally regime. Participation stands at 61% of names advancing YTD, modestly above the 50% midpoint and consistent with a genuine broad advance rather than a narrow one. The rally is concentrated in Energy and Industrials, while Real Estate and Health Care sit in negative YTD territory.

drivers.claim: Quality leader in Energy with exceptional risk-adjusted returns YTD.
Momentum fully extended; IT sector leadership clustered in one name.
Highest Sharpe in the brief; Industrials leadership on compressed drawdown.
Energy leadership sustained; six-month alpha well above benchmark.

risks.claim: Stretched 4.1σ above 5Y mean; elevated volatility percentile compounds risk.
Materials name 3.9σ above its 5Y mean at the 92nd volatility percentile.
Energy name 3.7σ above 5Y mean with the deepest drawdown in risks.
Industrials conglomerate 3.6σ above 5Y mean; overextended despite solid Sharpe.
